details.productUrlName: Empty the Warrens JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens.
Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"When engaging goblins in combat, assume that the number underground is at least double that of those you can see."
—Terrain Tactics and Environmental Magics
